# Noam Chomsky (乔姆斯基)

Noam Chomsky (乔姆斯基) is a key entity in cognitive science and psychology. Closely related to [[working-memory]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
